subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the mighty cord! Blessed art thou, for thou hast not been veiled by any veil, nor by any tie [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بحبل متین خوشا بحال تو که بهیچ حجابی محتجب نگشتی و بهیچ نسبت و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
